title: Tangy Ukrainian Aebleskiver Pancakes
description: A twist on traditional Ukrainian pancakes, these tangy aebleskiver pancakes feature aubergine and a hint of sweetness.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan or aebleskiver pan over medium heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together buttermilk, eggs, and melted butter.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Add the grated aubergine and stir to combine.
If using pancake mix, stir to combine.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop batter into the pan.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until the edges are set and the surface is dry.
Flip and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
